title: Aurora Palm Pals, Slomo Soft Toy, 33478, 5 inches, Brown
features: Part of Aurora's Palm Pal collection
Adorable Sloth cuddly toy that is filled with beans
Perfect gift for anyone who loves Sloths
description: From the manufacturer Palm Pals Slomo Sloth Soft Toy Palm Pal Slomo Sloth Soft Toy fits perfectly in the palm of the hand, he is full of beans which makes him super soft and squishy. His fur is dark brown with a light brown face and just like a real sloth, he has rings around the eyes. This little sloth has the cutest little smile which brings a smile to the face of everyone he meets. Palm Pal Slomo Sloth Soft Toy is a gorgeous soft brown sloth measuring 13 cm. Palm Pals make great gifts for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday, Christmas or as a just because gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable sloth.
